key_learnings: API concurrency limits can cause complete failure - need fallback providers or retry mechanisms
ADX calculation requires proper implementation of DI+, DI-, True Range, and Wilder's smoothing - not just a simple indicator
Percentile ranking is critical for normalization across different scales (price changes vs turnover ratios)
mootdx stocks() API may not directly return ChiNext codes - need alternative enumeration strategy
When real data is unavailable, synthetic data generation (as claudecode did) is better than complete failure
